summary: Iteration 21 - Navigation Menu Restructuring Validation. Frontend-only testing. All 4 navigation groups (Monitoraggio, Infrastruttura, Sicurezza, Sistema) present and functional. Collapsible groups working. All 9 navigation items accessible. Alert badge counter working. Active indicator with indigo accent verified. Mobile bottom nav with 5 items working.

issues: 'Made with Emergent' badge overlaps bottom navigation - this is an external badge, not an app issue

desktop_navigation_items: nav-alert - accessible with badge (7), routes to /alerts
collapsible_groups: Monitoraggio group collapse - items hidden when collapsed
Monitoraggio group expand - items visible when expanded
active_indicator: Active indicator is 2px width, absolute positioned on left
user_menu: User menu button present at sidebar footer
Logout button visible in dropdown menu
mobile_sidebar: All 4 nav groups visible in mobile sidebar overlay

critical_code_review_comments: Navigation restructuring implemented correctly with 4 groups
Role-based visibility working (admin sees all items)
Collapsible groups with smooth animation (groupSlideIn keyframe)
Alert badge counter fetches from /api/stats/summary every 30 seconds
Active indicator uses ::before pseudo-element with indigo accent color
Mobile bottom nav properly shows 5 items with Menu opening sidebar overlay
context_for_next_testing_agent: Navigation menu restructuring validated. 4 groups: MONITORAGGIO (Dashboard, Alert, Dispositivi), INFRASTRUTTURA (Clienti, Connettori), SICUREZZA (Vault Credenziali, Audit & Compliance, Gestione Utenti), SISTEMA (Impostazioni). All collapsible, role-based visibility working. Alert badge shows active count. Active indicator is indigo accent line on left. Mobile has 5-item bottom nav with Menu button opening sidebar overlay.

features_validated: Active indicator with indigo accent (2px left border)
User menu with logout at sidebar footer
Mobile sidebar overlay via Menu button
